scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run admin:dev" "npm run storefront:dev" "npm run backend:dev" "npm run pos:dev"
scripts.build: concurrently "npm run build --workspace=admin" "npm run build --workspace=storefront" "npm run build --workspace=backend" "npm run build --workspace=pos"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run preview --workspace=admin" "npm run start --workspace=storefront" "npm run start:prod --workspace=backend" "npm run preview --workspace=pos"
scripts.prod: npm run build && npm run start
